model

Class Card

  • java.lang.Object
    • model.Card

  • public class Card
extends java.lang.Object
    Description: Card class represents a Pokemon trading card with its properties. Stores information about a card such as name, type, rarity, expansion set, ID, and price.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Card(java.lang.String name, Type type, Rarity rarity, java.lang.String expansion, int id, double price)
      Description: Constructs a Card object with the specified properties.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String getExpansion()
      Description: Returns the expansion set of the card.
      int getId()
      Description: Returns the unique identification number of the card.
      java.lang.String getName()
      Description: Returns the name of the card.
      double getPrice()
      Description: Returns the price of the card.
      Rarity getRarity()
      Description: Returns the rarity level of the card.
      Type getType()
      Description: Returns the type of the card.
      void setExpansion(java.lang.String expansion)
      Description: Sets the expansion set of the card.
      void setName(java.lang.String name)
      Description: Sets the name of the card.
      void setPrice(double price)
      Description: Sets the price of the card.
      void setRarity(Rarity rarity)
      Description: Sets the rarity level of the card.
      void setType(Type type)
      Description: Sets the type of the card.
      java.lang.String toString()
      Description: Returns a string representation of the card with all its information.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Card

        public Card(java.lang.String name,
            Type type,
            Rarity rarity,
            java.lang.String expansion,
            int id,
            double price)
        Description: Constructs a Card object with the specified properties.
        Parameters:
        name - The name of the card
        type - The type of the card
        rarity - The rarity level of the card
        expansion - The expansion set the card belongs to
        id - The unique identification number of the card
        price - The price of the card

    • Method Detail

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Description: Returns a string representation of the card with all its information.
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object
        Returns:
        A formatted string containing the card's name, type, rarity, expansion, ID, and price

      • getName

        public java.lang.String getName()
        Description: Returns the name of the card.
        Returns:
        a String containing the card's name

      • setName

        public void setName(java.lang.String name)
        Description: Sets the name of the card.
        Parameters:
        name - the new name to assign to the card

      • getType

        public Type getType()
        Description: Returns the type of the card.
        Returns:
        a Type containing the card's type (e.g., Fire, Water, Grass)

      • setType

        public void setType(Type type)
        Description: Sets the type of the card.
        Parameters:
        type - the new type to assign to the card

      • getRarity

        public Rarity getRarity()
        Description: Returns the rarity level of the card.
        Returns:
        a Rarity containing the card's rarity level

      • setRarity

        public void setRarity(Rarity rarity)
        Description: Sets the rarity level of the card.
        Parameters:
        rarity - the new rarity level to assign to the card

      • getExpansion

        public java.lang.String getExpansion()
        Description: Returns the expansion set of the card.
        Returns:
        a String containing the card's expansion set

      • setExpansion

        public void setExpansion(java.lang.String expansion)
        Description: Sets the expansion set of the card.
        Parameters:
        expansion - the new expansion set to assign to the card

      • getId

        public int getId()
        Description: Returns the unique identification number of the card.
        Returns:
        an integer containing the card's ID

      • getPrice

        public double getPrice()
        Description: Returns the price of the card.
        Returns:
        a double containing the card's price

      • setPrice

        public void setPrice(double price)
        Description: Sets the price of the card.
        Parameters:
        price - the new price to assign to the card
